resume.raw_text:
=== Mingyu Huo - Resume.pdf ===
Carl (Mingyu Huo) 
(929) 319-9980 | Mhuo@schools.nyc.gov  

OBJECTIVE:  To obtain a position as a Secondary Mathematics Teacher 

EDUCATION:  Queens College, City University of New York, Flushing, NY 
B. A., Mathematics and Mathematics Education | GPA: 3.755 
     06/2026  

CERTIFICATION: 
     09/2026  

New York State Initial Certificate, Mathematics, Grades 7-12 

ACADEMIC HONORS: 
Fall 2022- 
Spring 2026     Dean’s List 

TIME 2000 4-Year Scholarship 

RELATED EXPERIENCE: 
Spring 2026  
                             Bayside High School, Flushing, New York 

Student Teacher 

•  Teach Geometry and Foundation of Geometry, and tutor Algebra through Calculus  
•  Create engaging lesson plans, prepare instructional materials, and grade assessments. 
•  Design and implement differentiated instructions to meet the needs of diverse learners. 
• 

Participated in New York State Science of Reading Micro-credential pilot program and applied research-
based literacy practices in mathematics instruction. 

    Fall 2025 
Initial Clinical Experience Student Teacher 
                          East-West School of International Studies, Flushing, New York 

•  Team-taught selected mathematics lessons in 7th grade. 
•  Assisted cooperating teacher in differentiating instruction and assessing students. 

Spring 2025- 
         Present  
Substitute Paraprofessional 
                          Flushing International H.S., Flushing, New York 

•  Organize events and manage student data, schedules, and assessments. 
•  Facilitate ESL exams for English language learners. 

EXPERIENCE:   
Spring 2023- 
  Spring 2024   Cashier 

99 Cent Store, Flushing, New York 
•  Handled cash transactions and guided customers to locate products. 
•  Verified orders of products and maintained organized well-stocked shelves.  

SKILLS:  

Google Classroom, Microsoft Office Suite, Google Workspace, Desmos, Canva, GeoGebra, 
Kahoot, Geometry Sketchpad, Smart Notebook; Mandarin & English. 

PROFESSIONAL  
MEMBERSHIP: National Council of Teachers of Mathematics 

REFERENCES: Available upon request

experience.title: Student Teacher
experience.description: Teaches Geometry and Foundation of Geometry; tutors Algebra through Calculus. Creates engaging lesson plans, prepares instructional materials, grades assessments, and implements differentiated instruction for diverse learners.

experience.title: Substitute Paraprofessional
experience.description: Organizes events and manages student data, schedules, and assessments. Facilitates ESL exams for English language learners.

experience.title: Student Teacher
experience.description: Team-taught 7th grade mathematics lessons. Assisted cooperating teacher in differentiating instruction and assessing students.

experience.title: Cashier
experience.description: Managed income and change, guided customers, verified deliveries, and restocked shelves.

experience.title: Cashier
experience.company: Qin Cha San Qian Milk Tea Store
experience.description: Took orders, managed transactions, prepared drinks, and managed store supplies.

experience.title: Intern
experience.description: Learned about museum roles and operations; visited the Jewish Museum to study artifact background information.

experience.title: Youth Leader
experience.description: One of five seniors selected to train as Youth Leader. Facilitated 9th–12th grade workshops on college awareness and consulted students on post-secondary decisions.

experience.title: Intern
experience.description: Met weekly with career professionals in computer science and business. Developed communication, presentation, interview, and problem-solving skills.

experience.title: Intern
experience.description: Learned Ready Maker, P5, Tinkercad, and 3D printing. Collaborated on a project about air pollution awareness. Developed hands-on skills in soldering and programming Arduino.

education.degree: Bachelor of Arts, Secondary Education and Teaching
